name: Guala Closures S.p.A.
summary: Guala Closures S.p.A. engages in the production and sale of aluminum and non-refillable closures in Europe, Asia, Americas, Oceania, and Africa. The company designs and manufactures safety, customized, aluminum, and roll-on closures for spirits, wine, water and non-alcoholic beverages, olive oil, and vinegar; and closures for pharmaceutical sector and others. It also manufactures PET bottles and miniatures. The company was founded in 1954 and is headquartered in Alessandria, Italy.
